title: SSE TTS Request
description: Request body for the Neuphonic Server-Sent Events text-to-speech endpoint.

text.description: The text to synthesize into speech.

voice.description: Voice ID or name to use for synthesis. Defaults to a standard voice if not specified.

speed.description: Speech speed multiplier. 1.0 is normal speed; values above 1.0 are faster.

sampling_rate.description: Audio sampling rate in Hz for the output PCM stream.
